Our President, Prof. Atilla Arkan, Appointed as a Member of the Presidential Board of Education and Training Policies

10.04.2025

Prof. Atilla Arkan, our President, has been appointed as a member of the Presidential Board of Education and Training Policies, which is responsible for making policy recommendations in line with Turkey’s educational goals and objectives.

Our President Prof. Atilla Arkan was appointed as a member of the Presidential Board of Education and Training Policies with the consent of our President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan. The appointment was officially published in the Official Gazette on April 10, 2025, and took effect immediately.

The Presidential Board of Education and Training Policies is tasked with providing policy recommendations in alignment with Turkey's educational goals, focusing on areas such as improving the education system, enhancing teaching methods, and raising quality standards in education.

Prof. Atilla Arkan will continue his duties as the President of our university while also serving as a member of the Presidential Board of Education and Training Policies. We wish him success in his new role and look forward to the continuation of his valuable contributions.
